summary: Drop 'Digg AI' / 'Digg AI 1000' / '1,000 AI accounts' product branding from prose surfaces; the CLI is now called 'Digg'.
reason: Upstream Digg's AI-news leaderboard now markets itself as plain 'Digg' (with /ai/ as the URL prefix). The 'AI 1000' framing was inherited from an earlier iteration of the product. Keeping it in display strings was confusing users.
validated_outcome: agent-context, --help, and SKILL.md frontmatter all now read 'Digg' and reference the four GitHub feeds.
scope_note: Internal code identifiers (roster_1000.go, the /ai/1000 endpoint path, ai_1000_fixture.html) are left alone — they describe the upstream endpoint, not user-facing prose.
